Model-spectrum harvest pool — REAL grounding errors (consensus-verified)
Six pointing models (weak→strong, 3 architectures: MolmoE-1B / Molmo-7B / Molmo2-4B / Qwen2.5-VL-3B+7B / InternVL3-8B) run on pointing 1404 + ReasonSeg 196 + filter 2400 = 4,000 (image, phrase) groups. Each prediction is scored vs GT, then quality-filtered by cross-model consensus: a clean_pos is GT-hit AND near consensus; a clean_neg is GT-miss AND far from consensus (real model error, not a GT-too-strict false-rejection).
24,000 predictions (13,245 GT-hit / 10,755 GT-miss) · quality: clean_pos 10,016 · clean_neg 2,649 · ambiguous 8,611 · no_pred 2,724 · 1,415 CLEAN preference pairs — directly usable RM training data
Yellow = GT region/box (mask for pointing+reasonseg, bbox/point for filter) · green dot = clean_pos · red dot = clean_neg · gray dot = ambiguous (no_pred dots hidden) · showing 30 sampled clean pairs across 3 benchmarks
